description_long: This is a two-tier open shelf unit featuring a minimalist industrial design. The frame is constructed from black metal, forming a rectangular structure with four vertical supports at each corner. The shelves themselves are made of medium-toned wood, providing a warm contrast to the dark metal frame. Both shelves are flat, rectangular, and spacious, with no visible back or side panels, allowing for easy access from all directions. The overall build is sturdy and functional, suitable for holding books, decor, or storage bins. Its open design makes it ideal for use in urban environments such as sidewalks, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A two-tier open shelf with a black metal frame and medium-toned wooden shelves, featuring a minimalist industrial style.
description_view_0: Front view showing both wooden shelves framed by the black metal supports, with full visibility of the shelf surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the rectangular profile of the metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the open structure and both wooden shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the shelf depth and metal frame profile.
